response: John Schlesinger was also a writer and film producer. He directed several films, including "Billy Liar" and "Far from the Madding Crowd," and was involved in producing works such as those of his colleague Ken Loach and John Schlesinger. Barbara Albert, on the other hand, is an Austrian writer, film-producer, and film-director, but she is not associated with directing or producing films in the same capacity as John Schlesinger.
